title: Saudi Arabian Tagine Beef Tacos
description: A fusion of Mexican and Saudi cuisines, this dish brings the rich flavors of tagine to traditional tacos. The fermented red bean paste adds a depth of flavor that pairs perfectly with the springy beef.

ingredients.name: Tagine Spice
ingredients.notes: A mix of saudi and arabian spices

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the red bean paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tagine spice, cumin, and chili powder and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a tortilla and topping with a lime wedge.
